sylvio      2010-06-29 11:58:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/octave-forge-es Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry Project, which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions plus build and install scripts.
  
  This is es.
  
  Spanish package for the construction of native language translations of Octave funcitons.
  
  WWW:    http://octave.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/147600
  Submitted by:   Stephen Montgomey-Smith <stephen@missouri.edu>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.662     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
